holdings.name: HDFC Bank
holdings.description: India's largest private bank by assets. 8,000+ branches, 25M+ customers. Net interest margin ~4%. Retail/SME/wholesale banking diversification. Post-HDFC Ltd merger, now a universal bank with home loan dominance.

holdings.name: Reliance Industries
holdings.description: India's largest company by revenue. Jio Platforms (450M subscribers), Reliance Retail (India's largest retailer), O2C (world's largest refinery complex) and New Energy (solar giga complex in Jamnagar).

holdings.name: ICICI Bank
holdings.description: India's 2nd largest private bank. ROE ~17-18%, NIM 4.3%. Digital banking (iMobile app, 40M+ users). Well-provisioned with PCR >80%. Strong retail franchise in mortgages, credit cards and savings accounts.

holdings.name: Infosys
holdings.description: India's 2nd largest IT company. $18B+ annual revenue from Fortune 500 clients in banking, insurance, retail and manufacturing. AI-powered delivery (Infosys Topaz), 300,000+ employees globally.

holdings.name: Larsen & Toubro
holdings.description: India's largest EPC company. ₹4 lakh crore order book. Executing metros, airports, defence, nuclear, data centers and highways across India and Middle East.

holdings.name: Tata Consultancy Services
holdings.description: India's largest IT company and most valuable brand. $27B+ revenue, 600,000+ employees in 50+ countries. AI.Cloud and GenAI services growing rapidly as Fortune 1000 clients modernise legacy systems.
